calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Authorizing Trustee And Attorney Compensation, Authorize Payment Of Costs Of Adm
Off Calendar Apr-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kristin Johnson (via court call) for (trustee) Richard Rabin.

The Court noted that there is no additional parties present and no one here to object, that we are here on a petition to authorize the trustee to terminate the trust, that an objection has been received but the objector is not present, that the objections premise based on the filings is that the claim is invalid due to a wrong date of birth of the beneficiary, that it made the claims unenforceable and that the trustee should not give them anything. Ms. Johnson stated that they do not have a response other than the objector had aired the same objection in the estate of the grandmother, that they do not find the date of birth incorrect, that they are not sure how he finds it incorrect, that the claim is valid and that they did provide service to the beneficiary. The Court stated that the objector is not present, that the court has reviewed all of the papers and granted the petition for order authorizing trustee and attorney compensation and authorize payment of costs (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
